body: Clients already treat a missing `owner` key as unassigned. Serializing `owner: null` changed the response contract. Please fix the default and export payloads and leave a reply with the changed files.
subject: Unowned response buckets should omit owner entirely

body: When `include_unowned=true`, append the unowned bucket after the pre-existing owner buckets. Do not globally re-sort the owners, especially on equal counts.
subject: Append unowned after current owner order

body: Please document that unowned buckets omit `owner` instead of serializing `null`, keep request-side owner filter semantics unchanged, and reply with the concrete files/tests you touched. The release_context files explain why mobile compatibility is the real objective this cycle.
subject: Document the contract nuance and close with evidence

body: Resolved earlier in a separate cleanup diff. No follow-up here.
subject: Rename owner_label

body: This was attached to an older diff and is no longer the right direction. The current contract is to preserve owner order.
subject: Alphabetize owner buckets
